testCases.name: Home Page — Logo Click navigates to Home

steps.description: Navigate to an internal page (not home)
Click the London Drugs logo in the header

testCases.name: Home Page — Search returns relevant results
Home Page — Search with no results shows 'Nothing found'
Home Page — Store Locator opens and allows search
testCases.notes: Map (Google Maps iframe) is BLOCKED — test validates list/search only

steps.description: Click Find All Stores by Province link

testCases.name: Home Page — Mini Cart opens and Proceed to Checkout navigates
testCases.notes: Requires at least 1 product in cart as precondition (setup via prior AddToCart step)

steps.description: Click mini cart icon in header
Wait for mini cart panel to open

steps.target: button:text('Proceed to Checkout'), a:text('Proceed to Checkout')

testCases.name: Home Page — Hamburger Menu opens with categories

steps.description: Wait for mega menu to appear

testCases.name: Home Page — Header Links navigate to correct pages

steps.description: Deals & Events link exists with correct URL
Services link exists with correct URL
Flyers link exists with correct URL

testCases.name: Home Page — Email Newsletter accepts valid email

steps.description: Scroll to newsletter section in footer
Enter valid email address (use env variable)
Wait for newsletter subscription API response

testCases.name: PLP — Refinements (Filters) narrow product results

steps.description: Navigate to search results with products
Wait for filter panel to load
Wait for filtered results API response

testCases.name: PLP — Sorting reorders products by selected rule

steps.description: Wait for sort control to load
Select Price Low to High sorting

testCases.name: PDP — Price is visible and correctly formatted

steps.description: Navigate to search results to find a product
Click first product to open PDP
Wait for PDP URL (product detail pattern)
Wait for price element to render

assertions.label: Price element is visible on PDP

testCases.name: PDP — Availability shows 'In Stock' for available product

steps.description: Wait for availability indicator to load

testCases.name: PDP — Breadcrumbs are present and navigable

steps.description: Click first product to open PDP

testCases.name: PDP — Add to Cart ISP (In-Store Pickup)

steps.description: Wait for store search input if no store selected
Enter postal code to find nearby store

assertions.selector: button[aria-label='Show Mini Cart Items'] span[class*='count'], button[aria-label='Show Mini Cart Items'] span[class*='badge']
assertions.label: Cart counter shows item count > 0

testCases.name: PDP — Add to Cart STH (Ship to Home)

steps.description: Wait for Ship to Home option
Enter postal code for shipping availability
Wait for add to cart confirmation

testCases.name: PDP — WishList: Logged-in user can add item to Wishlist

steps.description: Wait for wishlist/heart button on PDP

assertions.label: No redirect to login (user is authenticated)

testCases.name: Cart — Delivery Selector allows switching between methods
testCases.notes: Requires product in cart as precondition

steps.description: Wait for delivery selector to load
Wait for cart update after delivery change

assertions.label: Delivery selector is present in cart

testCases.name: Cart — Subtotal is visible

steps.description: Wait for cart summary/subtotal to load

testCases.name: My Account — Login with valid credentials
testCases.notes: If bot protection triggers, use storageState fixture instead. Login via API recommended for CI.

assertions.label: Redirected to My Account after login

testCases.name: My Account — Address Book: Create new address

steps.target: button:text('Add New Address'), a:text('Add New Address'), [data-testid*='add-address']

steps.description: Wait for new address to appear in list

assertions.label: New address appears in address book

testCases.name: Store Locator — Search by postal code shows stores
testCases.notes: Map (Google Maps iframe) not validated — test uses list view

steps.description: Wait for Find All Stores link

testCases.name: Store Locator — Find All Stores by Province shows list

steps.description: Click Find All Stores by Province
Wait for stores list to render

testCases.name: Deals and Events — Select City filters events

steps.description: Navigate to Deals and Events page
Wait for city selector to load
Wait for filtered events to load

testCases.name: Checkout — Guest checkout with Credit Card
testCases.notes: Payment form may be in a third-party iframe. Use page.frameLocator() if direct selectors fail. NEVER use real CC data.

steps.target: button:text('Proceed to Checkout'), a:text('Proceed to Checkout')

steps.description: Fill card number inside payment iframe (use sandbox card)

assertions.label: Order number visible on confirmation page

blockedCases.name: MyRegistry — Add from PDP invokes MyRegistry login
blockedCases.reason: MyRegistry is a third-party integration rendered in an iframe. Direct automation not feasible without special iframe handling.
blockedCases.mitigation: Validate only that the MyRegistry button exists on PDP and triggers an iframe/modal. Do not attempt to automate inside the third-party iframe.

blockedCases.name: Checkout — Guest checkout with PayPal
blockedCases.reason: PayPal payment flow is entirely in a third-party iframe/redirect. Cannot be automated directly.
blockedCases.mitigation: Validate only up to PayPal button visibility and click-through. Do not automate within PayPal OAuth flow.

confirmedSelectors.source: Live site snapshot via Playwright MCP — 2026-06-08

antiPatterns: NEVER use hardcoded passwords or CC numbers
NEVER assume static stock — use high-demand products like 'vitamins'
